groupings.title: Agentic AI
groupings.description: Build and operate agentic systems, including RAG workflows, evaluation harnesses, tool use, policy, sandboxing, agent configuration, and agent workflow automation.

groupings.title: Physical AI
groupings.description: Build and validate AI workflows that interact with the physical world, including robotics, autonomy, simulation, synthetic data, and embodied AI systems.

groupings.title: Vision AI
groupings.description: Build vision and video AI workflows for analytics, search, summarization, alerts, real-time understanding, and model integration.

groupings.title: Conversational AI
groupings.description: Build and deploy speech, voice, dialogue, and multimodal conversational AI workflows, including real-time assistant and voice-agent experiences.

groupings.title: Simulation and Modeling
groupings.description: Create, run, validate, and analyze simulation and modeling workflows for systems, environments, processes, and physical phenomena.

groupings.title: Data Science
groupings.description: Prepare, analyze, explore, and model data for AI and accelerated analytics workflows that are not specific to one training, inference, or agent task.

groupings.title: Training AI
groupings.description: Build, validate, tune, and maintain large-scale model training workflows, including distributed training, model support, training validation, performance tuning, and training-stack CI.

groupings.title: Inference AI
groupings.description: Deploy, serve, optimize, and evaluate models for production inference, including quantization, runtime performance, and serving configuration.

groupings.title: Decision Optimization
groupings.description: Formulate and solve routing, scheduling, and numerical optimization problems using optimization solvers, APIs, services, and deployment workflows.

groupings.title: GPU Development
groupings.description: Develop, tune, profile, and integrate GPU kernels and accelerated code, including CUDA-adjacent workflows, autotuning, low-level performance work, and framework integration.

groupings.title: Quantum Computing
groupings.description: Build, run, and validate quantum and hybrid quantum-classical applications, including CUDA-Q development workflows.

groupings.title: Infrastructure
groupings.description: Deploy, operate, monitor, and troubleshoot clusters, runtimes, services, networking, and platform infrastructure for accelerated and AI workloads.
